{{Quote|It was with sadness and horror that I watched Dentaal enter its final hours. Like many, I cheered its brave defiance of imperial rule, and yet knew with a sick dread what the outcome of such public resistance must inevitably be. Whatever the Imperial propaganda machines on the NewsNets might claim, I have no doubts that the plague which ravaged Dentaal was of Imperial origin.|[[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="GNN7">{{JournalCite|7|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
'''Dentaal''' was a [[planet]] in the [[Core Worlds]]. Its population was eradicated by an outbreak of the [[Candorian Scourge|Candorian plague]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|The horror continues to unfold on Dentaal as the Candorian plague continues to take its toll on the helpless populace trapped the system. Sometime in the first night, death came for the millions of beings who live in Calif City, as they became the first victims of a plague that has not been seen for dozens of years. In the past two days, over 10 billion people have died, as the deadly airborne virus sweeps over the entire Kindellan continent.|[[Galaxy News Service]]|<ref name="GNN5" />}}
Its main [[city]] was [[Calif City]]. It was ruled by the [[Dentaalian House|House of Dentaal]] until [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Governor]] [[Taliff]] disbanded it; after they formed the [[Dentaal Independence Party]] and [[Dentaal Uprising|overthrew]] him,<ref name="GNN5" /> [[Crix Madine]]'s [[Storm commando]]s wiped out much of the rebellious population by introducing the [[Candorian Scourge|Candorian plague]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> which broke out in Calif City and spread over the entire [[Kindelian]] continent,<ref name="GNN5" /> killing over 10 billion people and eventually wiping out every single inhabitant of the planet.<ref name="TCSWE" /> The Empire later blamed the plague, which killed nearly every living being on the planet, on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="GNN6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

During a series of military maneuvers on the planet, Madine simply disappeared from the Imperial armed forces.<ref name="FF130" /> By that time, the Alliance discovered that the Empire also unleashed another [[FNV-23|plague]] on [[Sedesia]].<ref name="TC">{{JournalCite|6|The Cure}}</ref>

The Imperial soldier Captain [[Bewil]] was a native of Dentaal.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Earlier sources placed Dentaal in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]],<ref name="GNN5" /><ref name="TCSWE" /> but the 2009 reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' established it as part of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="EAOC" />
